title: thelysia persica
intro: Thelysia persica, also known as the Indian teasel or bhangira, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Thelysia persica include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically as a paste or salve.
